changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'pathology test section' AND english = 'Pathology'

changeSet.comment: Create localization entry for Pathology test section

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'pathology test section' AND english = 'Pathology' LIMIT 1)

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND ts.name = 'Pathology'

changeSet.comment: Link Pathology Laboratory notebook template to Pathology department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Pathology';

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology
changeSet.comment: Ensure Pathology Laboratory notebook has all active organizations assigned.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_organizations (notebook_id, organization_id) SELECT n.id, o.id FROM clinlims.notebook n CROSS JOIN clinlims.organization o WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND o.is_active = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_organizations no WHERE no.notebook_id = n.id AND no.organization_id = o.id );
